stories.headline: Jelly Roll Files for Divorce From Bunnie Xo - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: Jelly Roll and Bunnie Xo are divorcing after more than 10 years of marriage.

stories.headline: Los Angeles Won Big at the 2026 James Beard Awards - Eater Los Angeles
stories.summary: The city took home awards for Best Chef California, Outstanding Wine and Other Beverages Program, and Outstanding Hospitality

stories.headline: Struggling ‘Celebrity Autobiography’ Announces Early Broadway Closing - Deadline
stories.summary: Celebrity Autobiography, the Broadway specialty production in which bold names read the read the memoirs of other bold-facers, will close early this month.

stories.headline: Corey Feldman Hospitalized After Medical Emergency on Flight - TMZ
stories.summary: Corey Feldman was rushed to a Los Angeles hospital after suffering a medical emergency ... TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: 'There’s No Cure': Famed NYC TV Anchor Reveals Diagnosis Live On-Air, And It’s Powerful - HuffPost
stories.summary: "Unless someone finds an amazing cure and really soon, tonight will be the last newscast I anchor," he said.

stories.headline: Olivia Rodrigo Fights Her Way Out of the Third-Album Rut - Vulture
stories.summary: Even when the ’80s-rock experiments don’t land, Olivia Rodrigo remains an effective storyteller of heartbreak on her third album, ‘You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love.’

stories.headline: Laverne Cox Says She’s Lost 90 Percent of Her Income Due to Trump’s DEI Rollbacks - The Hollywood Reporter
